name: Grilled Tuna with Mint Viniagrette
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon wine vinegar (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle tuna with pepper and coat with 1-2 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Cover and refrigerate until ready to cook.
3. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Taste and correct seasonings, adding salt and pepper as needed.
4. Grill tuna for approximately 4 minutes per side.
5. Spoon some vinaigrette across each steak and garnish with mint sprigs.
